docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ZYNSKI, KELLY
